data.description: A compass rose that rotates to reflect the camera's current heading. Fixed position (top-right or similar). Clicking it resets north-up orientation. Styled per RP-6 (Google Maps tokens). Should update via postRender listener on camera heading.
data.title: Compass widget

data.body:
VISUAL SPEC FROM MOCKUPS (docs/mockups/LOAD SCREEN.png):

POSITION: Top-right corner, ~16px margin.

APPEARANCE: Circular button, white/off-white bg. Icon = Mars location pin / teardrop shape — red upper half, dark/black lower half. Like a classic map pin but Martian-colored.

BEHAVIOR: Rotates to reflect camera heading (north-up = default orientation). Clicking resets camera to north-up.

Hover: circular bg tint, cursor pointer.

Note: mockup shows it static — the rotation behavior is inferred from compass widget conventions. Confirm rotation axis aligns with Cesium camera heading.
